list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Add cache and build info files to .next directory
These files were generated to store eslint cache, server component info, and TypeScript build metadata. They support faster builds and improved development performance.

task.summary:
Add contribution guidelines, templates, and project metadata
This commit introduces community standards and documentation to improve collaboration on the Teachers-Pages project. Includes a Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct, a contributing guide, various issue and pull request templates, a CODEOWNERS file, and updates to `package.json` for project metadata. These updates aim to enhance project maintainability and contributor experience.

Update README with Altzone branding and detailed resources
Revised the README to include Altzone branding, an introduction to the project, and links to key resources like the project wiki and contributor information. This improves clarity, highlights contributor efforts, and aligns the project with the broader Altzone initiative.

Add 'jest' and 'storybook' dependencies to package-lock
This commit adds 'jest' and 'storybook' as new dependencies in the `package-lock.json`. These additions are likely intended for testing and storyboarding purposes, enhancing the development experience. Other changes reflect updates to nested dependencies required to support these additions.

Add IDE configuration files for inspections and VCS mappings
Introduce default inspection profile enabling ESLint with warnings. Configure VCS mappings to use Git as the version control system. These files support consistent IDE settings across the project.

Add IDE configuration files for inspections and VCS mappings
Introduce default inspection profile enabling ESLint with warnings. Configure VCS mappings to use Git as the version control system. These changes ensure consistent IDE settings and streamline development workflows.

Add .gitattributes file for consistent line endings
This ensures consistent handling of line endings across different file types and operating systems. It enforces LF for most files while allowing CRLF for batch scripts. This improves collaboration and prevents potential line-ending issues.

Add cache and build info files to .next directory
These files were generated to store eslint cache, server component info, and TypeScript build metadata. They support faster builds and improved development performance.

MESSAGE.value:
Add CI workflow, contributor guidelines, and project templates
This commit introduces a GitHub Actions CI workflow for building, testing, and deployment. It also adds community files, including a Code of Conduct, contributing guide, CODEOWNERS, and standardized issue/PR templates, to streamline collaboration and improve project documentation.

Add contribution guidelines, templates, and project metadata
This commit introduces community standards and documentation to improve collaboration on the Teachers-Pages project. Includes a Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct, a contributing guide, various issue and pull request templates, a CODEOWNERS file, and updates to `package.json` for project metadata. These updates aim to enhance project maintainability and contributor experience.

Update README with Altzone branding and detailed resources
Revised the README to include Altzone branding, an introduction to the project, and links to key resources like the project wiki and contributor information. This improves clarity, highlights contributor efforts, and aligns the project with the broader Altzone initiative.

Add 'jest' and 'storybook' dependencies to package-lock
This commit adds 'jest' and 'storybook' as new dependencies in the `package-lock.json`. These additions are likely intended for testing and storyboarding purposes, enhancing the development experience. Other changes reflect updates to nested dependencies required to support these additions.

Add IDE configuration files for inspections and VCS mappings
Introduce default inspection profile enabling ESLint with warnings. Configure VCS mappings to use Git as the version control system. These files support consistent IDE settings across the project.

Add IDE configuration files for inspections and VCS mappings
Introduce default inspection profile enabling ESLint with warnings. Configure VCS mappings to use Git as the version control system. These changes ensure consistent IDE settings and streamline development workflows.

Add .gitattributes file for consistent line endings
This ensures consistent handling of line endings across different file types and operating systems. It enforces LF for most files while allowing CRLF for batch scripts. This improves collaboration and prevents potential line-ending issues.

"Update .gitignore to refine ignored files and directories
Simplified and reorganized the .gitignore file to improve readability and maintain relevant exclusions. Removed outdated comments and entries, added new ones for logs, build artifacts, and editor configurations while retaining critical exceptions."

Add cache and build info files to .next directory
These files were generated to store eslint cache, server component info, and TypeScript build metadata. They support faster builds and improved development performance.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Add cache and build info files to .next directory
These files were generated to store eslint cache, server component info, and TypeScript build metadata. They support faster builds and improved development performance.
